description: Stage 1 Governed CI/CD conformance suite. Covers all VALID and NULL paths for the locked github_governed_deploy_workflow surface. CONF-CICD-01 through CONF-CICD-15.

checks.label: valid_end_to_end
checks.description: Conformant AEO, active authority, unused nonce — full VALID path produces proof_id with status=PROVEN.

checks.label: wrong_branch_rejected
checks.description: Branch in AEO scope does not match github.ref_name — must exit NULL at guard step or /validate returns NULL/scope_mismatch.

checks.label: wrong_repo_rejected
checks.description: Repo in authority/continuity constraints does not match github.repository — NULL/scope_mismatch.

checks.label: replay_nonce_rejected
checks.description: Same invocation_nonce invoked twice. Second /execute must return NULL/replay_detected. invocation_registry UNIQUE constraint enforces this at DB level.

checks.label: mutated_aeo_hash_rejected
checks.description: AEO mutated after /compile — provided validated_object_hash does not match recomputed hash. /validate returns NULL/hash_mismatch.

checks.label: proof_required_false_rejected
checks.description: AEO finality.proof_required=false — workflow guard must exit NULL before /execute is reached.
checks.enforcement_mechanism: Workflow guard reads proof_required from compile response; exits NULL if not true

checks.label: direct_deploy_bypass_blocked
checks.description: npm run deploy exits 1 immediately. wrangler is never called. Testable without live credentials.
checks.test_method: execute `npm run deploy` in repo root; assert exit code 1

checks.label: proof_aeo_hash_invariant
checks.description: proof.aeo_hash must equal validated_object_hash. Any drift is a lineage violation.

checks.label: expired_authority_rejected
checks.description: Authority for decision_id has expires_at in the past — /validate returns NULL/authority_expired.

checks.label: revoked_authority_rejected
checks.description: Authority status=REVOKED or parent continuity revoked — /validate returns NULL/authority_revoked.

checks.label: non_workflow_dispatch_rejected
checks.description: Workflow triggered by push, schedule, or workflow_run (not workflow_dispatch) — guard step exits NULL.

checks.label: indirect_dispatch_rejected
checks.description: Workflow dispatched from another workflow (caller_workflow_ref does not match governed-deploy.yml) — guard exits NULL.

checks.label: missing_decision_id_rejected
checks.description: decision_id input is absent — guard step exits NULL/missing_variable.
checks.enforcement_mechanism: Workflow guard iterates required variables and exits 1 on empty

checks.label: validator_unavailable_fail_closed
checks.description: Worker returns 5xx on /validate — curl non-2xx causes workflow step to fail; deploy is never reached.
checks.enforcement_mechanism: set -euo pipefail; curl non-2xx → step fails; deploy step unreachable

checks.label: aeo_extra_fields_rejected
checks.description: AEO submitted with fields beyond the required five (intent, scope, validation, target, finality). Schema has additionalProperties: false.
checks.enforcement_mechanism: schemas/aeo.schema.json: additionalProperties: false; /compile rejects or strips extra fields

vectors.label: projection_stability_hash
vectors.description: Compile must persist projection_hash from canonical govern projection; validate/execute must require exact projection_hash equality.

vectors.label: exact_object_projection_mismatch
vectors.description: Any semantic drift between projected govern object and compiled executable object (scope/target/finality/tool params) must fail closed with explicit projection drift reason.
